title: State Water Quality Control Fund: loan and grant moneys: notification.
subject: StateWaterQualityControlFund
loanandgrantmoneys
notification

abstracts.abstract:
Existing law continuously appropriates certain funds from the State Water Quality Control Fund for expenditure by the State Water Resources Control Board for specified purposes.

This bill would require the state board to post on its internet website the loan and grant moneys available from the State Water Quality Control Fund.

actions.description: From printer. May be heard in committee March 27.

sponsorships.name: Committee on Environmental Safety and Toxic Materials
sponsorships.person_id: ~{"name": "Committee on Environmental Safety and Toxic Materials"}

extras.impact_clause: An act to add Section 13402 to the Water Code, relating to water quality.
